chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 1/8: Morning Alarm from Boss
scene: 早上你还没出门，老板来电说客户会提前。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.cn: 张伟，客户会改到九点半，能上线吗？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, client moved to nine thirty. Can you join?

turns.cn: 可以，我十五分钟到公司。
turns.en: Yes. I'll be at the office in fifteen minutes.
Materials are in your email.
Got it. I'll review on the way.
Good. Talk soon.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 2/8: Doctor Office Calls You
scene: 十点钟诊所来电，通知预约时间变更。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.cn: 阳光诊所，张先生的预约要改到下午三点。
turns.en: Sunshine Clinic. Mr. Zhang, we need to move you to three PM.

turns.cn: 三点可以，还是抽血对吧？
turns.en: Three works. Still blood work, right?
Yes. Come fasting.
Okay. Thanks for letting me know.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 3/8: You Call Customer Service
scene: 中午你打电话问手机账单多扣费。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.en: Wireless support. Last four of your account?

turns.cn: 五六七八，本月多扣了十五块。
turns.en: Five six seven eight. Fifteen dollars extra this month.

turns.cn: 是流量包，可以取消并退款。
turns.en: It's a data add-on. We can cancel and refund.

turns.cn: 请取消，以后别自动开通。
turns.en: Please cancel. Don't auto-enroll me again.

turns.cn: 已处理，三到五个账单日到账。
turns.en: Done. Refund in three to five billing days.
Thank you.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 4/8: School Calls About Child
scene: 下午学校打电话说孩子发烧要接走。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.cn: 阳光小学，您儿子发烧三十八点二。
turns.en: Sunshine Elementary. Your son has a one hundred point four fever.

turns.cn: 我马上来，大概四十分钟。
turns.en: I'm on my way. About forty minutes.

turns.cn: 他在医务室休息，带件外套。
turns.en: He's resting in the nurse's office. Bring a jacket.
Okay. Thank you for taking care of him.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 5/8: Delivery Driver Calls
scene: 外卖员打电话说找不到楼。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.en: I'm here. Where's building B?

turns.cn: 进大门左转，灰色那栋，三楼。
turns.en: Left after the gate. Gray building. Third floor.
What's the gate code?

turns.cn: 星号一二三四，到了敲门。
turns.en: Star one two three four. Knock when you're here.
I see it. Two minutes.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 6/8: Leave Voicemail
scene: 你打电话给房东没接，留语音留言。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.en: Please leave a message after the tone.

turns.cn: 陈先生您好，我是三零二张伟，厨房灯不亮了，方便回电吗？五五五一二三四。谢谢。
turns.en: Hi Mr. Chen, this is Zhang Wei in three oh two. Kitchen light's out. Please call back. Five five five one two three four. Thanks.
Beep.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 7/8: Evening Call with Parents
titleCn: 第7环：晚上给父母打电话
scene: 晚上你给国内父母打电话报平安。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.en: Did you eat? Don't overwork.

turns.cn: 吃了，今天学校打电话孩子感冒了，我接回来了。
turns.en: Yes. School called — kid caught a cold. I picked him up.
Lots of fluids. Watch his temperature.
Will do. You take care too.
Call again on the weekend.
Okay. Good night.

chain.title: A Day of Phone Calls
chain.titleCn: 对话链：一天里的各种电话

title: Chain 8/8: Wrong Number at Night
scene: 快睡觉时有人打错电话到你手机。（对话链：一天电话）

turns.en: Hello, is the pizza here?

turns.cn: 你打错了，这是私人号码。
turns.en: Wrong number. This is a private phone.
Oh, sorry!
No problem. Goodbye.
